subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the Book for the manifestation of love amongst His servants and hath willed to banish strife and corruption [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من انزل الکتاب لظهور المحبه بین العباد و اراد ان یرفع الجدال و الفساد
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @review of publications, @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity
